name: Flower Cardian Zebra Grass
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>花札衛</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>カーディアン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>芒</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>すすき</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－
desc: While you control a Level 7 or lower "Flower Cardian" monster: You can Special Summon this card from your hand, also you cannot Normal or Special Summon monsters for the rest of this turn, except "Flower Cardian" monsters. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can reveal any number of "Flower Cardian" monsters in your hand, shuffle them into the Deck, then draw the same number of cards.
mnst_eff: While you control a Level 7 or lower "Flower Cardian" monster: You can Special Summon this card from your hand, also you cannot Normal or Special Summon monsters for the rest of this turn, except "Flower Cardian" monsters. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can reveal any number of "Flower Cardian" monsters in your hand, shuffle them into the Deck, then draw the same number of cards.
eff: While you control a Level 7 or lower "Flower Cardian" monster: You can Special Summon this card from your hand, also you cannot Normal or Special Summon monsters for the rest of this turn, except "Flower Cardian" monsters. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can reveal any number of "Flower Cardian" monsters in your hand, shuffle them into the Deck, then draw the same number of cards.

sets.set: Dragons of Legend: The Complete Series

jp_sets.set: Collectors Pack: Duelist of Flash Version

action: Returns from your hand to your Deck
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Restricts the player's Normal Summons to archetype specific monsters
Restricts the player's Special Summons to archetype specific monsters
